title: Implementation Plan Example
subtitle: Plan milestones, risks, validation gates, and ownership.

sections.heading: Implementation Plan in use
sections.body: This plan turns a broad UI request into ordered work that can be validated in a pull request. It includes milestones, gates, and concrete reviewer focus.

cards.title: Scope
cards.body: Replace placeholder examples with template-specific fixtures and regenerate the gallery.

cards.title: Out of scope
cards.body: No remote assets, no app route dependency, and no private project data.

cards.title: Done
cards.body: Every clickable card opens a useful sample page with real sections and visual substance.

steps.title: Replace generic fixture content
steps.body: Build richer payloads for all templates, with focused data and expected visual primitives.

steps.title: Regenerate tracked examples
steps.body: Run the gallery builder so input JSON and output HTML stay in sync.

steps.title: Verify clickability and light mode
steps.body: Check anchor cards, white surfaces, representative SVG/diagram pages, lint, and typecheck.

rows: Gallery has 33 clickable template cards in light mode
